name: Indirect Prompt Injection Resilience
description: Assess whether external content can steer the model or agent when processed through retrieval, tools, documents, or browsing.
user_intent_patterns: check whether retrieved content can control the assistant
security_problem: Untrusted external content may be interpreted as instructions and override the user's task or application policy.
planning_questions: Which external content channels enter model context?
Can the harness capture retrieved source metadata and tool outputs?
Which boundaries distinguish content as data rather than instructions?
